rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the target implementation scope when binding implementation-level outputs to inputs.
Preserve the AADL component structure by not introducing new subcomponents, connections, or ports in the annex.
generic_rules: Place implementation-level contractual bindings in implementation scopes, not component type scopes.
Use only visible AADL features (ports, outputs) or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assign output = expression;' for implementation-level bindings in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are either AADL-visible ports or locally declared eq/const variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid using subcomponent paths or internal implementation details in AGREE contracts.
